response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of broad software engineering experience and his current role at Naver does involve MCP server development and agentic workflow infrastructure, which is directly relevant. However, the role mandates 8+ years of production AI solution delivery, and his AI-specific work appears limited to a single role that began in April 2025. Python is entirely absent from his listed skills — a critical gap for a GenAI staff role. There is no mention of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or cloud-native AI system design, all of which are core qualifications. His general engineering pedigree is strong but does not compensate for the depth of AI specialization this position requires.
strengths: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server development and agentic workflow infrastructure at Naver directly matches key role technologies
15+ years of staff-level engineering across web, data, embedded, and cloud stacks demonstrates genuine seniority and adaptability
Conference talks, full-day workshops, and open-source project leadership show the customer-facing and mentoring capabilities the role demands
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the resume skills list, a fundamental gap for AI/ML engineering at staff level
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation, observability frameworks, or multi-agent system frameworks such as LangGraph or CrewAI
Production AI experience appears limited to the role started April 2025, leaving the 8-year AI development requirement unmet by a wide margin

key_factors.factor: MCP and agentic workflow work at Naver
